Source   Edit  

Types

Host = ref object
  hostname*: string
  ip*: string
  port*: int
  username*: string
  nodeId*: int
Represents a host configuration for npsh. Source   Edit  

Procs

proc assignNodeIds(hosts: var seq[Host]) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Assign sequential node IDs to hosts that don't have explicit node IDs. Explicit node IDs take precedence. Source   Edit   
proc loadConfig(configPath = ""): seq[Host] {....raises: [IOError, ValueError],
    tags: [ReadEnvEffect, ReadIOEffect, ReadDirEffect], forbids: [].}
Load configuration from file. Defaults to ~/.npsh if no path provided, or NPSH_CONFIG environment variable. Source   Edit   
proc newHost(hostname: string; ip = ""; port = 22; username = ""; nodeId = -1): Host {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Create a new Host configuration. Source   Edit   
proc parseHostLine(line: string): Host {....raises: [ValueError], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
Parse a single line from the config file into a Host object. Source   Edit
